title: Unified Address generation (Sapling + Orchard receivers)
description: Generate a ZIP-316 Unified Address combining a Sapling receiver and an Orchard receiver for account 0. This is the default receive address shown to peers. Use zcash_address crate.
close_reason: Done: ZIP-316 Unified Address (Sapling + Orchard receivers) implemented in wallet/src/unified.rs and wallet/src/address.rs. Commit 3e70508 feat(wallet): ZIP-316 Unified Address encoding.
